_comment: Dell Image Assist - Driver Pack Override Map
_notes: Copy this file to DellDriverMap.json and add overrides as needed.
DellDriverMap.json is excluded from the repository - this example file is the template.
This file is an escape hatch for edge cases where the auto-scoring engine
picks the wrong driver pack. In normal operation with Dell standard ZIP naming
you do not need to add any entries here.
Format: 'model-key' maps to the exact ZIP filename on the share.
The model key is the lowercase WMI model string with spaces replaced by hyphens.
To find your model key: boot into WinPE and check the deploy.log,
